questions.question: Explain the difference between LSB (Least Significant Bit) encoding and BPCS (Run-Length Encoding and Counting Scheme) Steganography in the context of data hiding in images. (10 marks)
Describe the concept of lossless data hiding in images. What are some common techniques used for lossless data hiding? (15 marks)
How does LSB encoding work in the context of data hiding in images? Provide an example to illustrate your answer. (10 marks)
